auto_create_network.description: Determines whether a default network is automatically created for the project; set to false to disable automatic creation.

billing_account.description: The ID of the billing account to associate with the project; must be an active billing account.

deletion_policy.description: Defines the behavior for deleting the project, such as retaining or immediately deleting resources.

folder_id.description: ID of the parent folder where the project will be created; must be a valid folder ID within the organization.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the project, must be strings and comply with label naming conventions.

name.description: The name of the project, which must be unique within the organization and comply with Google Cloud's naming conventions.

org_id.description: ID of the organization under which the project will be created.

tags.description: Labels to categorize and organize the project; must be key-value pairs.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration to wait for each operation on the project, such as creation, update, or deletion.

project_id.description: The ID of the project to create.
